title: Collections Framework
description:
Java Collections provide dynamic data structures like ArrayList and HashMap.

Fix the code to properly use ArrayList and HashMap with generics.
objectives: Use correct methods: add(), get(), put()
hints: ArrayList uses add() to insert, get(index) to retrieve.
HashMap uses put(key, value) to insert, get(key) to retrieve.

checks.failMessage: Use get(i) method, not array notation.
